# Clothes Visualizer - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
A 3D clothes visualizer web app that uses scanned 3D human models to preview how clothes look on virtual avatars.

## Tech Stack
- **Framework**: React + TypeScript (Vite)
- **3D Rendering**: Three.js / React Three Fiber
- **3D Model Formats**: GLB/GLTF (scanned human models), OBJ/FBX support
- **Styling**: CSS Modules / Tailwind CSS

## Architecture
- `src/components/` - React UI components
- `src/components/viewer/` - 3D viewer components (canvas, model, lighting)
- `src/components/clothing/` - Clothing selector and overlay logic
- `src/hooks/` - Custom hooks for 3D model loading and state
- `src/models/` - Type definitions
- `public/models/` - 3D human scan assets (GLB/GLTF)
- `public/textures/` - Clothing textures
